logicalScenes.description: A spoon tip breaks the intact yolk on a finished bibimbap bowl; the yolk starts flowing over rice and vegetables.
logicalScenes.note: Texture-first opening; final bowl appears only as a hook, not as a slicing reveal.
logicalScenes.textureCue: glossy golden yolk spreading slowly
logicalScenes.sfxCue: soft yolk pop and wet gloss

notes: Use an egg-yolk state reference so the yolk does not break too early.

logicalScenes.description: Overhead view re-anchors the finished bowl: rice base, 5-6 colored topping zones, beef, and one egg centered in a 16-18 cm bowl.
logicalScenes.note: Pays off the opening by clarifying the bowl geometry immediately.
logicalScenes.textureCue: radial color contrast and sesame specks

notes: Scale lock: bowl 16-18 cm, one normal egg, not oversized.

logicalScenes.description: A short pour of dark chili-sesame sauce lands beside the yolk without flooding the bowl.
logicalScenes.note: Sauce amount is about one tablespoon for the hero bowl.
logicalScenes.textureCue: thin red-brown glossy ribbon

notes: Do not make the sauce opaque or excessive.

logicalScenes.description: A hard cut freezes on the glossy yolk and sauce touching grains of rice before jumping back to preparation.
logicalScenes.note: Bridge from final texture to making process.
logicalScenes.textureCue: yellow yolk, white rice, red-brown sauce

logicalScenes.description: Rinsed basmati rice swirls under clear water, then drains with visible separate grains.
logicalScenes.note: Compress utility prep but keep grain texture readable.
logicalScenes.textureCue: white grains, clear water, small bubbles

notes: Avoid rice becoming porridge.

logicalScenes.description: The covered saucepan opens after steaming; soft vapor reveals moist separated rice grains.
logicalScenes.note: Context re-anchor for rice cooking on the induction surface; use induction continuity, no flame.
logicalScenes.textureCue: steam veil and pearly grains

notes: No open flame; induction remains flush black plate.

logicalScenes.description: Rumsteck is cut into thin 0.5-1 cm by 4-6 cm strips on a board.
logicalScenes.note: Scale lock prevents steak or mince drift.
logicalScenes.textureCue: red beef fibers and clean knife cuts

notes: Bœuf strips must stay thin; not minced, not steak chunks.

logicalScenes.description: Soy sauce, sesame oil, sugar, garlic, and ginger whisk into a dark glossy marinade.
logicalScenes.note: No ingredient lineup; show the liquid forming.
logicalScenes.textureCue: black amber shine with tiny garlic and ginger flecks

notes: Marinade must be fluid, not paste.

logicalScenes.description: Beef strips drop into the marinade and become coated in a glossy layer.
logicalScenes.note: Thirty-minute rest is implied by a hard cut, not shown in real time.
logicalScenes.textureCue: shiny soy-sesame coating on separated strips

notes: Keep strips visible and separate.

logicalScenes.description: Three small piles wait separately: spinach, soybean sprouts, and green beans, each with its own color zone.
logicalScenes.note: Context shot establishes separated vegetable families.
logicalScenes.textureCue: green, pale, and darker green zones

notes: Do not mix vegetables before plating.

logicalScenes.description: Spinach is lifted from hot salted water after a brief blanch, glossy and dark green.
logicalScenes.note: Use utensil-first hot handling.
logicalScenes.textureCue: wilted glossy leaves with steam

notes: No cloth-in-hand transfer.

logicalScenes.description: Soybean sprouts are drained, pale stems bouncing lightly as water falls away.
logicalScenes.note: Keep sprouts legible, not noodles.
logicalScenes.textureCue: pale crisp stems and water beads

notes: Avoid noodle-like transformation.

logicalScenes.description: Green beans are cut or aligned into short pieces after cooking, still bright and firm.
logicalScenes.note: No mushy green bean pile.
logicalScenes.textureCue: firm green pods with clean ends

logicalScenes.description: Sesame oil and white sesame seeds coat each vegetable pile separately.
logicalScenes.note: Texture payoff: oil shine plus dry seed contrast.
logicalScenes.textureCue: tiny white seeds on glossy greens and sprouts

notes: Seeds should be visible, not dust.

logicalScenes.description: Carrots are cut into fine julienne, thin orange sticks rather than rounds.
logicalScenes.note: Scale lock: thin julienne, not chunky sticks.
logicalScenes.textureCue: crisp orange matchsticks

notes: Carrot shape must not become coins.

logicalScenes.description: Onion is sliced into pale arcs that separate under the knife.
logicalScenes.note: Utility cut compressed.
logicalScenes.textureCue: translucent onion layers

logicalScenes.description: Carrot julienne hits the hot pan and glistens in a fast toss.
logicalScenes.note: Carrots stay bright and structured.
logicalScenes.textureCue: orange gloss, light steam, crisp strands

notes: Do not brown into mush.

logicalScenes.description: Marinated beef strips land in the pan, sizzling as glossy sauce tightens around them.
logicalScenes.note: Core savory ASMR payoff.
logicalScenes.textureCue: brown edges, shiny sauce, separated strips

notes: No flames; no steak chunk.

logicalScenes.description: Onions are folded into the browned beef for a short glossy finish.
logicalScenes.note: Two-minute finish implied by hard cut.
logicalScenes.textureCue: translucent onion ribbons and caramelized beef

notes: Keep beef as strips, not a dark mass.

logicalScenes.description: An egg cracks cleanly into a pan; the white spreads while the yolk stays centered.
logicalScenes.note: Assumed egg presentation due source ambiguity.
logicalScenes.textureCue: clear white turning opaque, round intact yolk

notes: Yolk must not break in this scene.

logicalScenes.description: The egg finishes with white set and yellow yolk still glossy and domed.
logicalScenes.note: Reference-needed state for central topping.
logicalScenes.textureCue: matte white edge, glossy yellow center

notes: Not scrambled, not hard-boiled.

logicalScenes.description: Sesame oil and chili sauce are stirred into a fluid red-brown gloss.
logicalScenes.note: Avoid naming gochujang unless confirmed.
logicalScenes.textureCue: thin shiny sauce, red-brown streaks

notes: Sauce is not thick paste.

logicalScenes.description: A spoon lifts one tablespoon of sauce; it falls back as a narrow ribbon.
logicalScenes.note: Quantity lock for final bowl.
logicalScenes.textureCue: slow shiny ribbon from spoon

notes: One spoonful, not a ladleful.

logicalScenes.description: The egg, sauce bowl, beef, and vegetables wait as separate components around the empty hero bowl.
logicalScenes.note: Context prepares assembly without turning into a neutral ingredient lineup.
logicalScenes.textureCue: ready components with distinct colors

notes: Show prepared states, not raw mise en place.

logicalScenes.description: A scoop of steamed rice lands in the 16-18 cm bowl and spreads to cover the bottom.
logicalScenes.note: Assembly context re-anchor; hero bowl scale lock begins.
logicalScenes.textureCue: soft white grains flattening gently

notes: Rice base covers bottom, not a mountain.

logicalScenes.description: Spinach and soybean sprouts are placed as two distinct wedges over the rice.
logicalScenes.note: Do not mix; create clean zones.
logicalScenes.textureCue: dark green leaves beside pale sprouts

notes: Two wedges visible, not scattered garnish.

logicalScenes.description: Green beans and orange carrot julienne fill two more wedges, leaving the center open.
logicalScenes.note: Color contrast payoff.
logicalScenes.textureCue: green rods and orange matchsticks

notes: Maintain radial layout.

logicalScenes.description: Glossy beef and onions are tucked into a final wedge, brown against the white rice.
logicalScenes.note: Bœuf proportion: generous wedge, not covering the entire bowl.
logicalScenes.textureCue: brown shiny beef strips with pale onion arcs

notes: Beef strips remain 0.5-1 cm wide, 4-6 cm long.

logicalScenes.description: The fried egg is placed exactly in the center, normal egg size relative to the bowl.
logicalScenes.note: Context re-anchor for completed radial topology; egg scale lock: one egg, not oversized, yolk intact.
logicalScenes.textureCue: white disk and glossy yellow dome

notes: Avoid cloth-in-hand transfer; use utensil if handling is shown.

logicalScenes.description: White sesame seeds fall over the centered egg and colored wedges.
logicalScenes.note: Tiny texture payoff; visible seeds only.
logicalScenes.textureCue: white seeds on yellow, green, orange, and brown

notes: No text-like seed patterns.

logicalScenes.description: One tablespoon of chili-sesame sauce is poured in a small crescent beside the yolk.
logicalScenes.note: Sauce is a controlled accent, not full coverage.
logicalScenes.textureCue: red-brown crescent with reflective surface

notes: One spoonful only.

logicalScenes.description: The spoon tip presses into the yolk; yellow begins to stream into the sauce.
logicalScenes.note: Return to the opening hook as a controlled payoff.
logicalScenes.textureCue: yellow yolk ribbon meeting red-brown sauce

notes: Yolk breaks only now.

logicalScenes.description: A small scoop folds yolk, rice, sauce, and one strip of beef without destroying the whole radial layout.
logicalScenes.note: Bibimbap means mixed rice, but the full visual should remain readable.
logicalScenes.textureCue: sticky glossy grains with yolk and beef

notes: Mix only a small bite area; do not turn bowl into mush.

logicalScenes.description: Three-quarter kitchen hero shot: the Licorn character presents the finished bibimbap bowl on the light terrazzo island.
logicalScenes.note: Character supports the food, not a full-body performance.
logicalScenes.textureCue: colorful bowl in stable Licorn kitchen
logicalScenes.sfxCue: bowl set-down and soft room tone

notes: Keep kitchen identity and countertop material stable.

logicalScenes.description: A spoon lifts a single bite showing rice grains, beef strip, carrot, spinach, sauce, and yolk gloss.
logicalScenes.note: Bite scale: spoon-sized, not oversized.
logicalScenes.textureCue: layered bite with sticky shine and sesame specks

notes: No floating spoon; visible hand or clear utensil support.

logicalScenes.description: The Licorn character smiles satisfied behind the finished bowl, which remains the visual hero in the same kitchen.
logicalScenes.note: Ending requirement: finished dish in Licorn kitchen with character visible and satisfied.
logicalScenes.textureCue: bright bowl colors and glossy center
logicalScenes.sfxCue: tiny satisfied spoon tap, no speech

notes: No speech, no text, no music in video generation prompt.
